message: I’ll confess—I tend to be the gloriously over-prepared person in my circle. Just the other day, I made my husband practice our fire escape plan. He looked at me like I had three heads! But hey, it was a good excuse to check the smoke alarms, which, let’s be honest, can sometimes feel like they’re just there for decoration. I even made a little checklist for kitchen safety, because let’s face it, I might forget if I don’t write it down. 😅 This little refresher helped me feel more at ease, and who doesn't love a little peace of mind? How do you keep your home safe? Any quirky tips to share?
